name: PT Panin Financial Tbk
summary: PT Panin Financial Tbk provides business consulting, management, and administration services to the general public in Indonesia. The company also offers information technology and management information system services. In addition, it provides life insurance products, including death, whole life, annuity, endowment, endowment combine, universal life, unit-linked, personal accident, and health; and term insurance products. The company was formerly known as PT Panin Life Tbk and changed its name to PT Panin Financial Tbk in January 2010. PT Panin Financial Tbk was founded in 1974 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Panin Financial Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Paninvest Tbk.
